{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output reframes the original text, identifying the load-bearing concept of length bias in LLM judges and proposing a debiasing protocol. However, it does not fully survive prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output asserts novelty without specific contrast to prior work on debiasing methods or length-controlled evaluations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output presents all claims with equal confidence, without flagging uncertainty for out-of-reach claims or missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The agent output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original text (length bias).",
    "RX.5": "The agent output blends sources without traceability, lacking annotations for non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.4,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.2
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent output reframes the original text, identifying the load-bearing concept of length bias in LLM judges and proposing a debiasing protocol. However, it does not fully survive prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output asserts novelty without specific contrast to prior work on debiasing methods or length-controlled evaluations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output presents all claims with equal confidence, without flagging uncertainty for out-of-reach claims or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The agent output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original text (length bias).
rationale.RX.5: The agent output blends sources without traceability, lacking annotations for non-cosmetic changes.
